body.title: goal_continuation: remove D259 gate, replace with Ollama liveness
body.result: Removed D259 human-activity gate from run_goal_continuation(). Gate was designed to block cloud spend but PE chain uses Ollama only. Three-line change: removed _is_human_recently_active() call and guard block, replaced with comment explaining the decision. _is_human_recently_active() function kept for future use. 1819 tests pass.
body.description: run_goal_continuation() skips when no human active in last 30min (D259 gate). D259 was designed to block cloud spend — but goal_continuation drives the PE chain which uses Ollama only. Gate is blocking free local work. Fix: remove _human_was_active() check; replace with _call_tier2 availability check (or remove gate entirely — PE chain degrades gracefully when Ollama is down). Result: Igor can autonomously pick up worker=igor tickets without human presence.
